attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
D.ROWID, 
D.DOCUMENT_ID, 
D.CREATION_DATE, 
D.CREATED_BY, 
D.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
D.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
D.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
D.DATATYPE_ID, 
REGEXP_REPLACE(DD.USER_NAME , '[^A-Za-z0-9 .,;:_\-\/@()]', '') AS DATATYPE_NAME, 
 DL.DESCRIPTION, 
 D.FILE_NAME, 
 D.MEDIA_ID, 
 D.STORAGE_TYPE, 
 C.APPLICATION_ID AS CATEGORY_APPLICATION_ID, 
 D.CATEGORY_ID,
 CL.USER_NAME AS CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION , 
 D.SECURITY_TYPE, 
 D.SECURITY_ID,
 D.PUBLISH_FLAG, 
 D.IMAGE_TYPE, 
 D.USAGE_TYPE, 
REGEXP_REPLACE(L.MEANING  , '[^A-Za-z0-9 .,;:_\-\/@()]', '') AS USAGE_TYPE_DESCR  ,
 D.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
 D.END_DATE_ACTIVE, 
 D.REQUEST_ID,
 D.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
 D.PROGRAM_ID, 
 D.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, 
 DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
 DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE1,  DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE2,
 DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE3, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE4, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE5, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE6, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE7, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE8,

 DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE9, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE10, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE11, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE12, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE13,
DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE14, DL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE15
 
 , D.DM_NODE, D.DM_FOLDER_PATH, D.DM_TYPE, D.DM_DOCUMENT_ID, D.DM_VERSION_NUMBER, D.URL, DL.TITLE, D.ORIG_DOC_ID 
 
 
 FROM  GGACML.CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS D ,
   GGACML.CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_TL DL,
 OPS$GGADM.CG1_FND_DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES_TL CL, 
 OPS$GGADM.CG1_FND_DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES C,
 OPS$GGADM.CG1_FND_DOCUMENT_DATATYPES DD, 
 OPS$GGADM.CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES L
WHERE
 D.DOCUMENT_ID = DL.DOCUMENT_ID AND DL.LANGUAGE= USERENV('LANG') AND D.DATATYPE_ID = DD.DATATYPE_ID AND DD.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND D.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID AND C.CATEGORY_ID = CL.CATEGORY_ID AND CL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND D.USAGE_TYPE = L.LOOKUP_CODE AND L.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND L.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'ATCHMT_DOCUMENT_TYPE' AND
 D.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND  D.LAST_UPDATE_DATE <= (SELECT MAX(D.LAST_UPDATE_DATE) FROM GGACML.CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS )

SELECT
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOCUMENT_ID, 
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.CREATION_DATE,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.CREATED_BY,                     
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,  
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DATATYPE_ID,                
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DATATYPE_NAME, 
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DESCRIPTION,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.FILE_NAME,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.MEDIA_ID,                  
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.STORAGE_TYPE,                     
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.CATEGORY_APPLICATION_ID,              
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.CATEGORY_ID,                 
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.SECURITY_TYPE,                
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.SECURITY_ID,                             
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.PUBLISH_FLAG,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.IMAGE_TYPE,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.USAGE_TYPE,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.USAGE_TYPE_DESCR,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.END_DATE_ACTIVE,                  
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.REQUEST_ID,                            
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,             
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.PROGRAM_ID,                            
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,  
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,            
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE1,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE2,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE3,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE4,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE5,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE6,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE7,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE8,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE9,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE10,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE11,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE12,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE13,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE14,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOC_ATTRIBUTE15,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DM_NODE,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DM_FOLDER_PATH,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DM_TYPE,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DM_DOCUMENT_ID,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DM_VERSION_NUMBER,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.URL,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.TITLE1,
STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.ORIG_DOC_ID
FROM 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL  STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL,
(
SELECT DOCUMENT_ID , LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM  $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL
MINUS
SELECT DOCUMENT_ID , LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM  $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL
)ACM 
WHERE 
ACM.DOCUMENT_ID = STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.DOCUMENT_ID
AND ACM.LAST_UPDATE_DATE = STG_CG1_FND_DOCUMENTS_VL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
